title: Uralepis capensis

This family is further divided into several subfamilies, with Uralepis capensis being a part of the subfamily Asclepiadoideae. The Asclepiadoideae subfamily is characterized by its unique flowers with corona and hoods, which are an adaptation for attracting pollinators. This subfamily is also known for its diverse range of plant species, many of which are native to tropical and subtropical regions. Uralepis capensis, in particular, is endemic to the southwestern part of Africa.
